questions.question: Describe the main difference between Geth and Parity, two popular Ethereum clients. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Geth and Parity are both Ethereum clients, but Parity is a derivative of Geth and was developed by the Parity team.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the `--datadir` flag when running Geth? (5 marks)
questions.hint: The `--datadir` flag specifies the directory where Geth will store its data, such as blockchain and transaction data.

questions.question: How can you use the `geth --datadir` command to create a new Geth node and start the Ethereum network? (5 marks)
questions.hint: To create a new Geth node and start the Ethereum network, use the `geth --datadir` command to specify the data directory and start the node.
